alltime_1d.note: Best overall signal. Proximity to FOMC/CPI/NFP provides edge.
Second best. LLM quality/valuation analysis working well.
Good contrarian signal BUT collapsing recently (25.9% recent 7d).

recent_7d.note: Surging +25.3% from all-time. Works in ranging market.
Surging +13.7%. Ranging market is its sweet spot.
Up +6.5%. Calendar effects more reliable in current regime.
Bollinger Bands working well in range-bound market.

alltime_1d.recommendation: Similar paradox: 43.4% all-time but 58.7% recent. Needs regime gate.

recent_7d_collapsed.note: Extreme fear (index 9) but market not reversing. Contrarian logic breaking in war regime.
Iran war news overwhelms normal keyword sentiment.
Macro indicators confused by simultaneous war + strong jobs + oil shock.
Structural breakout signals failing in ranging market.
Volatility signals misfiring in compressed range.

correlation_clusters.issue: These signals vote nearly identically. Double-counting the same pattern detection.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Downweight one or combine into single vote.

correlation_clusters.issue: Highly anti-correlated. They cancel each other out in consensus voting.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: In ranging regime, favor mean_reversion (65.4% recent). In trending, favor fibonacci.

correlation_clusters.issue: Both capture oversold/overbought mean reversion. Moderate redundancy.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Acceptable - different methodologies reaching similar conclusions is confirmatory.

correlation_clusters.issue: Moderate correlation. Volume flow at 55.5% and oscillators at 34.3% - oscillators are dragging.
correlation_clusters.recommendation: Force-HOLD oscillators for BTC. Volume flow alone is better.

regime_performance.insight: Ranging market strongly favors mean-reversion and technical signals over macro/sentiment signals. The system should dynamically weight signals based on detected regime.

cross_ticker_agreement.XAG_vs_XAU: 44.4% consensus agreement -- metals need independent analysis
cross_ticker_agreement.BTC_vs_ETH: 40.4% consensus agreement -- crypto pair diverging significantly

recommendations.title: Implement regime-adaptive signal weighting
recommendations.description: Use the ranging/trending regime detection to dynamically adjust signal weights. In ranging: upweight mean_reversion, bb, fibonacci, macd. In trending: upweight trend, structure, momentum_factors.

recommendations.title: Force-HOLD oscillators signal globally
recommendations.description: Oscillators is 34-39% across all tickers. Worse than coin flip everywhere. Should be gated.

recommendations.title: Force-HOLD crypto_macro signal
recommendations.description: crypto_macro is 17.6% for ETH and 29.8% overall. Actively harmful.

recommendations.title: Decorrelate candlestick and fibonacci for BTC
recommendations.description: Correlation 0.708 means double-counting. Downweight fibonacci when candlestick is active for BTC.

recommendations.title: Add recent-accuracy-weighted voting
recommendations.description: Weight each signal vote by its recent 7d accuracy. This automatically adapts to regime shifts.

recommendations.title: Add per-ticker signal gating
recommendations.description: Sentiment for XAG is 4.5%. Ministral for XAG is 18.9%. These should be gated per-ticker, not just globally.
